---
title: "Anthony Stewart"
subtitle: "Atkinson Postdoctoral Fellow"
image: images/portraits/anthony.JPG 
role: postdoc
weight: 9
aliases: ["Anthony J. Stewart", "A. Stewart", "AJS"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:ajs544@cornell.edu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/ajs0428"
    - icon: wifi
      text: Website
      href: "https://ajs0428.github.io"
---
I am interested in characterizing and quantifying carbon storage and cycling across terrestrial and aquatic environments using field collected measurements with remote sensing and machine learning.
